scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; npm.cmd run dev"
scripts.build:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; npm.cmd run build"
